Mental health conditions
Depression 
Depression is a low mood that can last a long time or keep returning, affecting your everyday life.
Top tasks in Depression 
Get urgent help now for mental health
Types of depression
Read about the different types of depression, such as depression in adults, psychotic depression and depression after giving birth.
Coping with depression
Read about how to cope with depression yourself, or how to help someone else.
Improving low mood
Read about self-help techniques that could help you improve your low mood.
